# Pull Request

## Scope

Describe the change and list the affected files.

## Change Type

- [ ] Provider research
- [ ] Provider correction
- [ ] Benchmark addition
- [ ] Methodology change
- [ ] Documentation maintenance
- [ ] Repository automation

## Provider or Batch

- Provider ID:
- Batch ID:
- Related issue:

## Sources

List source IDs or links added or changed. For provider claims, confirm source tiers follow [11_SOURCE_POLICY.md](../11_SOURCE_POLICY.md).

| Source ID | Tier | Claim scope | Archive present |
|---|---|---|---|
| — | — | — | — |

## Validation

- [ ] Schema checked against [02_PROVIDER_SCHEMA.md](../02_PROVIDER_SCHEMA.md)
- [ ] Output structure checked against [07_OUTPUT_SPEC.md](../07_OUTPUT_SPEC.md)
- [ ] Hard gates checked against [05_VALIDATION_RULES.md](../05_VALIDATION_RULES.md)
- [ ] QA checklist completed using [08_QA_CHECKLIST.md](../08_QA_CHECKLIST.md)
- [ ] Style checked against [06_STYLE_GUIDE.md](../06_STYLE_GUIDE.md)
- [ ] Changelog updated according to [12_CHANGELOG.md](../12_CHANGELOG.md)

## Missing Information

Document any missing fields that remain and why they are acceptable for this PR status.

## Potential Inconsistencies

Document conflicting sources or state that none were found.

## Reviewer Notes

Call out high-risk claims, schema changes, or areas needing careful review.
